A 91

HOMEWOOD SUITES BY HILTON

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: February 24, 2026

HOMEWOOD SUITES BY HILTON passes cleanly. The state put it at an A, 91/100, at its latest health inspection on February 24, 2026.

On health score it's safer than 44% of St. Lucie County restaurants we grade. Diners rate it 4.3 from 957 reviews.

Get directions Call (772) 345-5300

    • 24 — Storage & handling of clean equipment and utensils; air drying
